horoscope: The Sun moved into your sign almost two weeks ago, dear Aries, but Mercury and Mars have been in the sign behind yours. As such, in some ways, you have been somewhat withdrawn or even felt caged in at times. Today, however, Mars enters your sign, and you're experiencing a re-awakening of sorts. With Mars in your sign until May 18th, you feel very much in your element (Mars is your ruling planet, after all), comfortable in your own skin, and energetic and confident. Watch for impatience and brusqueness, however, as you can easily get carried away. Tackle projects that you've let slide and direct your considerable energy into reviving works-in-progress or new endeavors. It can be a time to heartily pursue your personal goals. You prefer to do things on your own, to be the first, to pioneer, and to take the lead, and this is an excellent time to do so.

Mars enters your solar twelfth house today, dear Taurus, where it will transit until May 18th. This transit always precedes the period when Mars transits your own sign, and it's a time for reorienting yourself in preparation for busier, more assertive times to come. Over the coming weeks, you'll be reorganizing your goals and desires, perhaps questioning certain pursuits before you gain clarity. You may need more rest than usual and more time to come to decisions. Your energy levels can be at a low, or they can fluctuate, during this cycle. In general, this is a time for recharging your energy stores. Avoid inclinations towards devious tactics to get what you want, as these never truly satisfy. However, do seek ways to put lingering problems behind you.

Mars enters your solar eleventh house today, dear Gemini, where it will transit until May 18th. In the period ahead, your desire for the freedom to be yourself and to express yourself authentically is strong, and you may feel less limited or restricted. You're especially motivated--even driven--to pursue your goals and dreams in concrete ways. When Mars inevitably forms challenging aspects during this period, there can be conflicts or unrest with friends as you need to address matters that have been brewing or held at bay. However, you also possess more energy and drive than usual to organize projects, take the lead on group or team projects, and strengthen friendships. It's a great time to reach out to others and organize activities with them. Your humanitarian impulses are stirring!

Mars moves to the top of your solar chart today, dear Cancer, beginning a competitive and energetic cycle for goal-related or professional matters. While conflicts can emerge in the period ahead, you are motivated to push yourself to excel and improve, consider your long-term goals, and take charge of your responsibilities. Mars will visit this area of your solar chart until May 18th, bringing considerable energy to your professional life. Ambitions are stirring, and you are more eager to perform well and to meet your responsibilities. You've likely had many ideas about what you'd like to do to improve your life, and now you are more able to put these into action. There may be times during this cycle when you feel you are on the "hotseat" with more attention coming your way, but remind yourself that defensiveness won't help your case. Instead, cultivate a forthright yet considerate approach to others, and especially authority figures and business associates, for maximum success.

Mars moves into a fellow fire sign today, dear Leo, where it will visit until May 18th. This transit amounts to a real energy boost for you. You are turning a corner now in terms of energy and confidence. You are especially eager and energetic, as your joie de vivre comes to the fore. You are in sync with your natural physical and energy expression in the weeks ahead, and there is a generally braver quality to you that attracts more adventure to your life. This comes after a quite introspective trend, so that your eagerness to experience life without worrying too much about the why, where, and what can be particularly refreshing. Symbolically, you are beginning to move on rather than nursing concerns. Mars tends to energize and motivate you to take on new projects or to challenge yourself with new goals and activities.

Mars moves into your solar eighth house today, dear Virgo, where it will visit until May 18th, animating  matters of sharing and intimacy. While the surface heat in relationships decreases as Mars now moves out of your partnership sector, you're looking at deeper aspects of relating during this new cycle. Strategy, power, and self-control are activated areas. You are learning that power is not about having the upper hand with others; it's about managing your own energy effectively. This cycle turns up the heat on the more intricate elements of relating. Sometimes, this transit correlates with disputes over money. However, it's also a time for taking charge of what you owe or what you're owed. The desire to get to the root of problems is with you, and you have much to discover! You may put considerable energy into your relationships, a pet project, or into self-understanding during this cycle. You're particularly courageous about dealing with your inner demons and the trickier elements of your life that tie you in unhealthy ways to people, methods, and things.

Mars enters your solar seventh house today, dear Libra, where it will transit until May 18th. This influence enlivens your relationships with others, sometimes stirring up conflicts, but also generating excitement, passion, and activity. Rushing into a new relationship or partnership is possible during this cycle, or it's a time to tackle problems fearlessly, even those that have been brewing under the surface. At the very least, relationships are unlikely to be predictable or boring at this time. There can be friction between you and a significant other, which need not be difficult if handled mindfully. Shared activities can help release excess energy. There can be some "push and pull" as you work toward a state of equality and balance in your life. Your relationships tend to move quickly now -- there can be clashes, but also resolutions.

Mars heads into your work and health sector today, dear Scorpio, bringing great energy to your daily routines and self-care efforts until May 18th. You can be raring to go with self-improvement efforts and driven to get more work done or take better care of your body through more dynamic or targeted health and nutrition programs. Difficulties arise if you feel others are pushing their work on you or telling you what to do in the period ahead, and if you give in to impatience. Strive to assert yourself confidently but mindfully now, and watch for pushing yourself too hard, too fast. If you've been craving better methods and programs for health and work, this is the time when you are ready to take action. This transit animates your daily routines.

You begin a personally magnetic and attractive cycle today, dear Sagittarius, with Mars in flowing aspect to your sign. This cycle can bring fewer obstacles or at least the perception of such! You do have a greater inclination to stir the pot, but mostly in constructive ways in the weeks ahead. Mars will transit your solar fifth house until May 18th, marking a turning of the corner for you. You're more confident, involved, and spirited, and you're likely to pour a lot of your energy and initiative into actively pursuing a rewarding love life, social amusement or hobbies, activities with children, and pleasure in general. You have a likable competitive, more energetic and pleasingly assertive temperament during this transit.

Energetic, fiery Mars begins its transit of your sector of home and family today, dear Capricorn, and will visit and animate this area of your solar chart until May 18th. This influence brings much energy to your domestic life, perhaps too much, at times! If you use this transit well, you can get a whole lot done around the home and you can be more assertive and forthright with family members in the weeks ahead. Mind you, there can sometimes be argumentativeness or tension with those very close to you. You are especially protective of yourself and others, so be careful that you don't take on a defensive attitude that prevents others from getting close to you during this cycle. Aim to direct your energy into productive channels, such as redecorating, organizing your home, partaking in family activities, or actively working on problem areas in your personal life.

Mars enters your solar third house today, dear Aquarius, where it will visit until May 18th. This can be a busy, communicative time for you. The motivation to learn, connect, and pursue your mental interests is strong in the weeks ahead. However, impatience can be a problem now if you feel others are not keeping your quick pace. Mars acts to speed up your daily routine in a variety of ways, and while quick words and actions or competitiveness are potential challenges of this position, with awareness of these tendencies, you're in a position to manage them. In fact, it's a strong period for mental resourcefulness and sharpness, as well as for increased motivation to learn and connect with others. It's a time to feed your need for mental stimulation and engagement more often, without overdoing it, and pouring more energy into your personal interests.

Mars exits your sign today and enters your solar second house, dear Pisces, where it will visit until May 18th. This new transit stirs your desire to improve your lot in life. In some ways, your life tends to settle down, but Mars does stir a stronger than usual desire to bring abundance into your life. You may feel increasingly motivated to make money, but you are also capable of impulsive purchases during this period! It's best used for building and developing your projects and for the confidence to pursue what you want. There can be some tensions surrounding personal finances and possessions, but also the drive to manage these things.
